title: Pterodactyl Nest on Cliff Coloring Page

seoDescription: Download and print this medium pterodactyl nest on cliff coloring sheet. Ideal for kids and teens with balanced outlines, natural textures, and a beautiful scenic background. Free printable PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: Unlike birds, the wings of Pterodactyl were formed by a skin and muscle membrane stretching from its elongated fourth finger to its hind limbs.
Pterodactyl was a carnivore, using its long beak filled with sharp teeth to catch fish, insects, and small land animals.
